headline: Multiple Catalysts Prompted The London Company Small-Mid Cap Strategy’s Cooper Companies (COO) Addition
summary: The London Company released its Q1 2026 investor letter for “The London Company Small-Mid Cap Strategy”. In early 2026, US equities declined, with the Russell 3000 falling 4% and the S&P posting losses. A copy of the letter is available to download here. The year started positively with a broad rally, but sentiment reversed in March due […]
